embeds.description:
A Morimens Challenge Run series with a fresh account

CURRENT RULESET:
- A new account must be created at the start of the run
- Premium pulls and Silver Core can ONLY be used on the Kaleido Recollections banners
- Standard pulls can ONLY be used on the Wheel of Destiny banner (no characters!) or Gn
